overview: Flourish Functional Medicine combines functional medicine with direct primary care, offering root-cause treatment for hormone imbalance, inflammation, gut issues, and chronic fatigue. The clinic provides extended appointments, advanced lab testing, and ongoing support through messaging and virtual care.
highlights: IV Therapy and Wellness Injections (Shot Bar)
Infrared sauna and red light therapy
targetAudience: Patients seeking personalized functional medicine treatment for hormone imbalance, inflammation, metabolic resistance, and chronic fatigue.
